{% macro render_form(form, action='', method='POST', class='') %}
{{ form.hidden_tag() }} {% for field in form %} {% if field.type != 'HiddenField' and field.type != 'CSRFTokenField' %} {{ render_field(field) }} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endmacro %} {% macro render_field(field, label_visible=true) %}
{% if label_visible %} {{ field.label(class='form__label') }} {% endif %} {{ field(class='form__input') }} {% for error in field.errors %} {{ error }} {% endfor %}
{% endmacro %}
